review_summary: Ref mutation doesn't trigger re-render. UI shows stale.

issues_found.title: No re-render
issues_found.explanation: Ref updates don't trigger render. Click About → ref updates → UI doesn't change.

broader_pattern: useRef = mutable no-render; useState = render on change.

review_summary: refs.current never cleared. Removed items leave dangling DOM nodes.

issues_found.title: Map grows forever
issues_found.explanation: Items removed = refs stay. Memory leak.

broader_pattern: Ref callbacks handle both set and unset.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Ref callbacks set + unset on mount/unmount.

review_summary: Concurrent calls race. Last-fired-first-completed pattern.

issues_found.title: Stale results
issues_found.explanation: Standard

code_under_review: type GetData<T> = T extends { data: infer D } ? D : any;
review_summary: any fallback defeats type safety.

issues_found.title: any escapes
issues_found.explanation: never or unknown safer.

review_summary: Not focusable. No keyboard. No combobox role. Standard a11y disaster.

issues_found.title: Not keyboard
issues_found.explanation: Standard

issues_found.title: SR unaware
issues_found.explanation: Standard

review_summary: Three subscriptions. Three setter calls = three re-renders.

issues_found.title: Multiple re-renders
issues_found.explanation: Each set = subscriber re-renders.

review_summary: No URL encoding. No abort. Race: type 'alice' → 'bob' → 'alice' result returns last → wrong message.

issues_found.title: Race
issues_found.explanation: Standard

issues_found.title: URL encoding
issues_found.explanation: Standard

review_summary: mode=wait makes user wait for exit before next page. Slow perceived.

issues_found.title: Sequential animations
issues_found.explanation: Exit completes before enter starts. Adds duration.

review_summary: Apollo is heavy. ~30KB for client + cache.

issues_found.title: Heavy
issues_found.explanation: Apollo is comprehensive but heavy. urql or graphql-request lighter alternatives.

review_summary: Async throws don't propagate to ErrorBoundary. Unhandled rejection.

issues_found.title: Not caught by boundary
issues_found.explanation: ErrorBoundary catches render errors. Event handler async = unhandled promise rejection.

broader_pattern: Render-thrown errors caught; async needs setState.
what_makes_this_review_senior: ErrorBoundary scope; setState + throw in render to escalate.

review_summary: items in deps means runs on every items change. Plus extra render.

issues_found.title: Re-fires on items change
issues_found.explanation: items reference may change without content change.

issues_found.title: Could be in render
issues_found.explanation: setState in effect = double render.
issues_found.verification: Verify Mounting with derived data. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.

broader_pattern: In-render conditional setState avoids double render.

review_summary: Tab already focuses next - reimplementing default behavior. Plus tight coupling via refs.

issues_found.title: Default behavior reimplemented
issues_found.explanation: Tab moves focus naturally if DOM order correct.

issues_found.title: Tight coupling
issues_found.explanation: FormA knows about FormB internals.

broader_pattern: Default browser behavior is usually right.

review_summary: No SRI. No CSP consideration. Plus React doesn't render scripts this way.

issues_found.title: React doesn't run scripts
issues_found.explanation: Script tags from JSX don't execute in React.

issues_found.title: Subresource Integrity
issues_found.explanation: Third-party script could be compromised.

issues_found.title: Need allowlist
issues_found.explanation: Strict CSP blocks unknown scripts

broader_pattern: Third-party scripts in index.html with SRI + CSP.
fixed_code:
<!-- index.html (Vite) -->
<head>
  <script
    async
    src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=GA_ID"
  ></script>
  <script>
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    function gtag(){ dataLayer.push(arguments); }
    gtag('js', new Date());
    gtag('config', 'GA_ID');
  </script>
</head>

<!-- CSP header: script-src 'self' https://www.googletagmanager.com -->
what_makes_this_review_senior: Third-party scripts handled outside React; CSP.

review_summary: During SSR (without RSC), lazy renders fallback. Client renders Heavy. Mismatch.

issues_found.title: SSR renders fallback
issues_found.explanation: React.lazy doesn't render real component in SSR (without RSC). Hydration sees mismatch.

broader_pattern: For SSR, use loadable or RSC, not React.lazy.
what_makes_this_review_senior: lazy + SSR mismatch; loadable as alternative.

review_summary: HMR doesn't reset module-level state. Multiple WS instances after edits.

issues_found.title: HMR leaves stale
issues_found.explanation: Edit triggers HMR. Module re-evaluates. Old socket leaked.
issues_found.fix: useRef or proper singleton with cleanup

review_summary: generateInitialItems runs every render even though only first matters.

issues_found.title: Re-runs every render
issues_found.explanation: Argument evaluated each render even though only initial render uses.

review_summary: AudioContext created on import. Created even if never used. Plus no close.

issues_found.title: Created eagerly
issues_found.explanation: Created on import even if app never uses audio.

issues_found.title: Resource leak
issues_found.explanation: AudioContext never closed.

review_summary: setSaving after unmount = warning. No abort.

issues_found.title: setState on unmounted
issues_found.explanation: Component unmounts during save = setState warning.

issues_found.title: Save continues
issues_found.explanation: Unmounted but POST continues.

code_under_review: const [user, setUser] = useState({} as User);
review_summary: Empty object asserted as User. user.email is technically undefined, typed as string.

issues_found.title: Type assertion lies
issues_found.explanation: {} doesn't have User fields. Access crashes.

review_summary: SR uses heading hierarchy for navigation. Skipping = confusing.

issues_found.title: Skipped h2
issues_found.explanation: SR users navigate by heading levels. Skip = navigation broken.

issues_found.title: Reversed hierarchy
issues_found.explanation: Inverts logical structure.

review_summary: Reducer with side effect. Strict mode double-invokes, double-writes localStorage.

issues_found.title: Impure
issues_found.explanation: Strict mode invokes reducer twice. localStorage writes twice. Plus testing harder.

review_summary: any type. Hand-rolled validation. Should use schema.

issues_found.title: any types
issues_found.explanation: Untyped.

issues_found.title: Repetitive
issues_found.explanation: Zod handles required + custom.

review_summary: motion per item = 1000 motion components for 1000 items. CSS would handle this.

issues_found.title: Per-item overhead
issues_found.explanation: Each motion creates animator. 1000 items = lots of work.

what_makes_this_review_senior: CSS for repeated simple; reserve motion for complex.

review_summary: moment + 20 locales = 600KB. Deprecated lib. Native Intl works.

issues_found.title: 600KB
issues_found.explanation: Massive bundle.

review_summary: localhost in production build. Server has different URL.

issues_found.title: Wrong URL in prod
issues_found.explanation: Production build runs on CI/server. localhost:3000 doesn't exist there.

what_makes_this_review_senior: Build environment awareness; direct DB > HTTP at build.
